who: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor contracts/month, manual tracking causes missed renewals and supplier penalties. We streamline contract management instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and vendor performance metrics.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams seeking solutions
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar contract management challenges
DM outreach to procurement teams with a demo video
Community forums where procurement teams share best practices
try_it: Let users try contract renewal reminders and performance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV imports for existing vendor data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce onboarding steps for new users
